title: Opening for Category Manager at Flipkart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Flipkart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Flipkart Global Group:
Flipkart Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Global Group!
